title: Model/tool selection + keep-pushing loop + tab-pool/rate + FIRST REAL SEND
directive: Complete the tool: (1) general label-driven model/tool selection (Radix menus), (2) keep-pushing loop (persistent Session, verify each turn), (3) tab pool + adaptive send-rate budget. Build OFFLINE first (mock-proven). Then MINIMAL real legs (attended, own-tab, FRESH throwaway chats ONLY): real model/tool selection NO send (sustained ~12s read); FIRST REAL SEND = one 'Reply with only the word: PONG' smoke; loop 2 iters 'continue'. TOTAL real sends <= 4. Contract team/contracts/M7-model-tools-loop.md.

ground_truth.acceptance_command: uv run pytest (mock suite; real_site deselected by addopts -m 'not real_site' AND gated on ASK_CHATGPT_REAL=1)
ground_truth.real_send_enabler: channels/cdp.py fill/insert_text/click/hover/press/upload_files ALL raise HumanActionNeededError('CDP action/send path deferred to M7; M5 is read-only') at cdp.py:518-536,661-663. M7 must implement them mirroring issues/cdp-send-repro/controller.mjs (REAL-PROVEN: execCommand('insertText')+InputEvent fill; click visible+enabled button[data-testid=send-button]/aria-label='Send prompt'; verify new user turn).
ground_truth.draft_send_gap: session.py:261-262 ask(conv_or_url=None) raises NotImplementedError('draft conversation sends are deferred beyond M4'). Both real legs need a FRESH chat -> M7 must implement draft-conversation send (open new chat https://chatgpt.com/, send, learn server conversation_id, eager-write under real id).
ground_truth.send_orchestration_built: send.py (fill_composer/submit_composer/verify_prompt_submitted/read_turn_baseline/wait_for_idle_and_reload_if_needed) + completion.py (wait_for_completion) ALREADY built + mock-proven against the BrowserChannel seam; gotcha-4 (PromptNotSubmittedError on no new user turn) already enforced in verify_prompt_submitted (send.py:128-167).
ground_truth.tabpool_budget_stubs: session.py TabPool (lazy-open/LRU/own-tabs-only/close-all built; MISSING idle-TTL eviction) + AdaptiveSendBudget (MINIMAL: submission counter + busy guard only; MISSING politeness floor + AIMD + backoff + hard-pause). loop (session.py:373-416) is a MOCK-ONLY fake yielding fabricated records.
ground_truth.menus_stub: menus.py open_radix_menu/enumerate_radix_options/select_radix_label/set_tools all raise/return-empty; select_model only checks reflected label (no open/click). M7 makes them executable.
ground_truth.selectors_real: src/ask_chatgpt/selectors/real.json: composer #prompt-textarea, tools_button button[data-testid=composer-plus-btn], send_button_unverified_no_input button[data-testid=send-button],#composer-submit-button, stop_button button[data-testid=stop-button], radix_portal [data-radix-popper-content-wrapper], model_picker_trigger_candidates 'composer-footer button[aria-haspopup=menu]', user_turn/assistant_turn [data-message-author-role=...][data-message-id].
ground_truth.model_labels: Instant/Medium/High/Extra High/Pro Extended (tiers, menuitemradio); family submenu GPT-5.5 (menuitem->radio): 5.5/5.4/5.3/4.5/o3. Tools menu: Add photos & files/Create image/Deep research/Web search/More. NEVER open Recent files/Projects submenus (operator privacy).
ground_truth.model_label_transient: On reload/hydration the composer model button briefly shows 'Extra High' (effort control) before settling to e.g. 'Pro Extended' -> verify selection via SUSTAINED (~12s) read; never halt on a single mismatch (controller.mjs confirmViolation: 6 reads x 2s).
ground_truth.design: team/evidence/reports/M3-detailed-design.md §2.6 menus, §5 completion, §6 send, §7 concurrency, §10 M7, §11 decisions. AUTHORITATIVE design (best-of-N, verified). M7 implements §10 M7 steps 1-4.

constraints_safety: SHARED browser w/ another ACTIVE agent (keep-pushing on target 6a316aa8 via controller.mjs). REAL LEGS: own-tab-only (never read/iterate/touch foreign tabs OR target 6a316aa8); FRESH throwaway chats ONLY; never quit browser (detach only); preflight curl /json/version first; login/Cloudflare->STOP HUMAN-ACTION-NEEDED + read-only poll; no stealth; allowlist; redirect ask/scrape stdout to /dev/null (leak lesson); NEVER persist/log authorization/oai-*/cookie values; model-label SUSTAINED ~12s read; human-paced (politeness floor + backoff; do NOT spam). TOTAL real sends <= 4, all to fresh throwaway chats. ZERO sends to target/foreign. Branch rewrite-v2 only; never move/commit/merge stable (779eb40); never uv tool install/upgrade/reinstall (uv run/uv sync only); never git push; never commit cache content; do NOT stage issues/cdp-send-repro/controller.mjs (other agent's dirty file) or human/. Workers=pi via .claude/skills/manager/references/launchers/parent-claude/pi-watch.sh; NEVER the Claude Agent tool; this manager=Opus.

queue.title: Real legs attempt 1
queue.result: PARTIAL (report team/evidence/reports/M7-T3.md, script scripts/m7_t3_real.py). 1 real send used (authoritative send_budget counter); browser NOT quit; own-tab-only; no leak; target 6a316aa8 untouched. FINDING A (leg2 headline): draft send SUBMITTED ok (gotcha-4 PASSED on real site! new user turn appeared) but ask() raised bare InternalError post-submit, no /c/<id> learned. ROOT CAUSE confirmed in source: _learn_post_submit_ref (session.py:457-476) reads ask_chatgpt_current_url ONCE and fail-closes if not /c/<id>; real SPA navigates with latency -> single read too early. ask_chatgpt_current_url IS implemented (cdp.py:150 window.location.href) so cause is latency not missing key. FIX=T3b (poll URL bounded channel-clock). FINDING B (leg1 selection): model_trigger_count=0 (query_turns model_labels empty: composer-footer button[aria-haspopup=menu] does NOT match live composer) + tools menu TimeoutError. commit_policy: Workers EDIT + report; MANAGER independently re-derives (uv run pytest + diff inspect + leak grep) then commits explicit code/config/test paths (no -A, no push, no Co-Authored-By). Reports/contracts/handoffs under team/ committed after leak check. cache/ content NEVER committed. .pi-workers/ gitignored. M7-manager-state.json kept uncommitted. NEVER stage issues/cdp-send-repro/controller.mjs or human/.
notes: Offline editing single-worker + sequential (T1a then T1b both edit session.py -> no parallel). Design input = verified M3 (no fresh design panel per Occam; M3 already did+verified best-of-N design). Rigor invested in VERIFICATION panels (T2 offline, T4 real). Real legs attended + serialized (shared account, human-paced). If budget runs low: checkpoint + commit code + PARTIAL handoff (multi-session-sized like M4/M5/M6).
